case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. JON ABRAHAM et al

docket_entries.description: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK A UTAH STATE CHARTERED BANK HEARING SET FOR OCT-26-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK A UTAH STATE CHARTERED BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABRAHAM, JON AKA JON CORY ABRAHAM, AN INDIVIDUAL $84,498.22 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $84,498.22, PLUS COSTS AND STATUTORY INTEREST AT THE RATE OF 10% ACCRUING FROM THE DATE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT.
